documents.title: Nominee 278

documents.title: Certificate of Divestiture OGE-2025-089 to 098
documents.summary: Divestiture certificate documenting compliance with mandatory divestiture of specific holdings as required by the ethics agreement. Document content is not publicly downloadable; available via Form 201 request from OGE.

documents.title: Compliance Certification
documents.summary: Certification of ethics agreement compliance. Marked affirmatively on required sections including divestitures, periodic transaction reporting, recusal compliance, and ethics training completion.
